values.value: Flags any single user with three or more MFA verification failures in the last 24 hours. Repeated MFA failures for one user are a strong signal of an MFA fatigue or push-bombing attack, an attacker testing stolen credentials, or a compromised session attempting to complete a second factor.

Contact the user out of band to confirm whether they were attempting to sign in. If not, reset their password, revoke active sessions and tokens, and require MFA re-enrollment. If yes, document the cause (lost device, slow network) and consider strengthening the user's MFA method.
